text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Standing at 180 cm tall, Hishi Akebono is a big
Umamusume, and her dream is to become
someone who can satisfy others with her races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In other words, she dreams to become chanko!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her towering frame has been turning heads since
before her debut, but she'll need a resilient body
if she hopes to take advantage of her size.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, our main goal is to bulk up and
strengthen her body as we set forth to take on
the Twinkle Series!
